message:
chore(gitignore): add ephemeral/agent-scratch patterns observed during ru sweep

Ignore files that are legitimately produced by agent workflows but
should never be committed to the repo: NTM session state (.ntm/),
beads recovery/vacuum/rebuild snapshots, per-machine IDE MCP client
configs, csplit scratch output, root-level one-off fix/patch/apply
scripts, ubs/clippy audit reports, and root-level scratch test source
files and binaries left behind by bug-hunt sessions.

Observed and ignored during a ru multi-repo sweep that left these
files intentionally untracked in the working tree because they were
clearly ephemeral. Adding them to .gitignore so future git status is
clean without requiring per-agent discipline.

files.patch:
@@ -99,3 +99,16 @@ storage.sqlite3.bak
 storage.sqlite3.corrupt-*
 storage.sqlite3-shm.corrupt-*
 storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
+
+# NTM session state
+.ntm/
+
+# Beads ephemeral DB artifacts (bad/rebuild/vacuum snapshots)
+.beads/beads.db.bad_*
+.beads/beads.db.rebuild_*
+.beads/beads.db.vacuum_*
+.beads/beads.db.rebuild_c*
+.beads/beads.db.vacuum_c*
+
+# Beads recovery scratch databases and probe directories
+artifacts/beads_recovery/
